text: Mobile app development has become a key skill in today's digital world. When building an app, developers must first decide between native and cross-platform approaches. Native apps are designed for one operating system, like iOS or Android, offering high performance but requiring separate development for each platform. Cross-platform tools, such as React Native, allow a single codebase to work on multiple systems, though performance may sometimes lag behind. Regardless of choice, responsive design is essential to ensure the app looks and functions well on different screen sizes. Finally, apps are usually distributed through official app stores, which have strict guidelines for quality and security.
